example: There is a microwave oven in the dormitory kitchen.
Please put your dirty clothes in the laundry basket.
We sat on the couch and watched a movie.
You can find the room numbers on the bulletin board.
My pencil is blunt. Do you have a sharpener?
Don't forget to buy laundry detergent before washing your clothes.
There is a coffee stain on my shirt.
The library has many charging sockets near the tables.
Check the website for the latest update on exam schedules.
This shirt has many wrinkles. I need to iron it.
Let's meet in the student lounge after class.
Could you pass me the iron? I need to press my pants.
Use a cart to carry all those heavy books.
May I borrow your eraser? I made a mistake on my homework.
You are allowed to use a calculator during the math test.
He always carries his laptop in his backpack.
The printer in the computer lab is out of paper.
Ask the librarian if you need help finding a book.
You can use the scanner to make digital copies of your notes.
Please return your books at the front counter.
The library staff are very friendly and helpful.
You need to swipe your student ID card to enter the gym.
